src/main/java/com/test/catalog/domain/mo._comment: Domain record with List<UUID> and List<String> fields. Must import both java.util.List and java.util.UUID.

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: Feign client for the GET operation — no request body, has path variable.

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/applicati._comment: Output port — method must include the path variable parameter.
